item.title: And what a journey is has been since the moment I said, вАЬIвАЩl...
item.description:
View on Instagram


And what a journey is has been since the moment I said, вАЬIвАЩll have to do it myself!вАЭ рЯ§ѓI honestly have to keep pinching myself and even then IвАЩm still having trouble fathoming the sheer size of the project I achieved. рЯПЖI know this is only the beginning and thereвАЩs a long way to go but the amount of skills and knowledge I picked in just 8 weeks of completing my house foundations has opened up a whole new door for me рЯЪ™And IвАЩm so excited to continue opening doors as this journey unfolds and watch the evolution over time, this is the beginning of something magical I can feel it вЬ®рЯМї#housefootings #foundations #ownerbuilder #howhardcanitbe #illdoitmyself #containerhouse

item.title: рЯЫ†пЄПрЯП†How I started my container home build journey рЯП†рЯЫ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


рЯЫ†пЄПрЯП†How I started my container home build journey рЯП†рЯЫ†пЄПThe vision wasnвАЩt always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.рЯТ™Life is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. рЯІНI believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we donвАЩt see reality as it is, we see it as we are рЯСАThis is your life, your reality and the key word here is вАШyouвАЩ! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? вЬ®рЯЂґ#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream

item.title: ItвАЩs been 6 weeks now sinceвА¶I decided to do my own house fou...
item.description:
View on Instagram


ItвАЩs been 6 weeks now sinceвА¶I decided to do my own house foundations рЯП†As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. вЪТпЄПHowever with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. рЯ§ЈвАНвЩАпЄПBut wow itвАЩs been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming вМЫпЄПThis is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasnвАЩt until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more вАШdo-ableвАЩ рЯЪЬThe majority of the six weeks that IвАЩve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. рЯЩЛ WhatвАЩs your opinion? вђЗпЄПDo you think itвАЩs worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though itвАЩs taking 2-3x the amount of time? рЯ§ЈвАНвЩАпЄП#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy

item.title: Even after all the challenges IвАЩve faced on this build I still...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Even after all the challenges IвАЩve faced on this build I still head into the build every day with a вАЬhow hard could it be attitudeвАЭ рЯШВSome days IвАЩm spot on the money and others itвАЩs 10x harder than I could have ever imagined but without fail after the end of every back breaking day the next morning I wake up and IвАЩve somehow reset back to my same вАШhow hard can it beвАЩ outlook.IвАЩm not sure what type of wizardry this is, IвАЩm just grateful рЯШЭвЬ®

item.title: Final roof elements are getting completed now! вП∞With the facia...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Final roof elements are getting completed now! вП∞With the facias installed the only two things I have left are gutters and trim and with them being so light how hard can it be right рЯШЭ

item.title: Just over a year ago I had never welded a day in my life and now...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Just over a year ago I had never welded a day in my life and now thereвАЩs rarely a day when IвАЩm not welding something рЯС©вАНрЯП≠Did I pick up the skill straight away? No. Was I a natural? No Did I work my ass off at it and weld for hours a day until I was pretty dam good, F*** YES I did! We arenвАЩt disappointed when a child doesnвАЩt come out of the womb running and we donвАЩt judge how smart a fish is on its ability to climb a tree.LetвАЩs give ourselves the same courtesy and not let the fear of not being able to do something keep us from doing anything at all рЯНГ

item.title: Now that the last roof sheet is up I can start to move onto the ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Now that the last roof sheet is up I can start to move onto the final important components of the roof like fasciaвАЩs, gutters and trim! рЯШЭIвАЩll be installing a lot of timber on the underneath of the roof for the final touch but that will be done towards the end of the build рЯП†

item.title: Hands up if youвАЩve been waiting for this one for a while рЯЩЛв...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Hands up if youвАЩve been waiting for this one for a while рЯЩЛвАНвЩАпЄПI know I have! рЯШЭI got my last roof sheet a couple months ago (and two spare because IвАЩve learnt from my past mistakes рЯШВ) but I had no way of actually getting off the roof when I had the last roof sheet installed.But I finally bought scaffolding which meant a safe passage to the ground! вШБпЄП

item.title: You never know what life has around the corner for you but I tru...
item.description:
View on Instagram


You never know what life has around the corner for you but I trust that if I roll with the punches itвАЩll have my back вЬМпЄП
